## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] No hardcoded colors — uses theme tokens
- [ ] Translations added for new UI text
- [ ] Tested on both light and dark themes
